Looking at this trace, I need to systematically verify the small operations (rotations, XOR, AND) and the addition chains in each round, checking for a single-bit tamper.

## Verification Process

Standard SHA-256 IV: a=6A09E667, b=BB67AE85, c=3C6EF372, d=A54FF53A, e=510E527F, f=9B05688C, g=1F83D9AB, h=5BE0CD19 ✓

### Message Schedule (L0003–L0018)
Message bytes map correctly to W[0]–W[12], padding byte 0x80 in W[12], length 400=0x190 in W[15] ✓

### W[16] verification (L0019)
σ1(W[14])=0, σ0(W[1])=0xBE78A358, sum with W[9] and W[0] gives 0x931345D4 ✓

### Round-by-round checks (selected highlights)

**Rounds 0, 3, 8, 10, 13, 15, 20, 25, 30:** Verified S1 (bit-by-bit ROTR+XOR), ch (AND/XOR), all additions (step1–temp2), new a and new e. All match (L0070–L0500). Example: Round 30 S1 at L0490 = 0x979FD537 ✓; ch at L0491 ✓; all sums through L0500 ✓.

**Rounds 32, 37, 40, 43, 44, 45, 47, 48, 50, 55, 60, 63:** Verified ch, S1, step additions, temp1/temp2, new a, new e. All match. Example: Round 63 temp1 at L0957 = 0x0F6EC016, temp2 at L0960 = 0x0BEB0143, new a at L0961 = 0x1B59C159 ✓, new e at L0962 = 0x87B73A34 ✓.

**Inter-round propagation:** Verified shift values pass correctly between consecutive rounds (e.g., round 7→8 at L0179/L0181, round 16→17 at L0305/L0307, round 42→43 at L0669/L0671, round 56→57 at L0865/L0867). All match ✓.

**S0 and maj:** Verified in rounds 15 (L0286–L0287), 30 (L0496–L0497), 47 (L0735), 48 (L0749), 50 (L0776–L0777). All match ✓.

### Final Hash (L0964)
